title: Making Actions with MCP and Stripe
tagline: Let a book agent take a real test-mode action by creating a Stripe checkout link through MCP.

story.problem: The agent can answer, remember, and pass tests, but production agents also need to take external actions safely.
story.solution: Connect a Stripe MCP server in test mode, require explicit approval, and create a payment link for a fictional book purchase.
story.outcome: An action-capable agent that demonstrates MCP tool use without giving the model uncontrolled side effects.

quickstart.configure: cp .env.example .env  # then fill NEBIUS_API_KEY and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY

endpoints.description: Run the action-capable agent and stream approval/action events.
Approve or reject a pending Stripe MCP action.
